lab: ni kan zong shi you ren shou wo chen ai you sa chu zhao xia shi gong sheng de zhou wen rang ci sheng wu jia qian ni de shou a zai sui yue zhong xia xian hua zai xun chang yan huo ren jia yong man chang man man de hui da yun hui sheng qi yu hui luo xia bu yong cui cu a nai xin de ren a cai ke yi kan jian tong hua
lab_without_tone: ni kan zong shi you ren shou wo chen ai you sa chu zhao xia shi gong sheng de zhou wen rang ci sheng wu jia qian ni de shou a zai sui yue zhong xia xian hua zai xun chang yan huo ren jia yong man chang man man de hui da yun hui sheng qi yu hui luo xia bu yong cui cu a nai xin de ren a cai ke yi kan jian tong hua
raw_text:
你看总是有人手握尘埃又撒出朝霞
是共生的皱纹让此生无价
牵你的手啊在岁月种下鲜花
在寻常烟火人家用漫长慢慢地回答
云会升起雨会落下不用催促啊
耐心的人啊才可以看见童话
